rule_schema.standard_reference: Exact section or rule reference in .agents/skills/cross-platform-app-workflow/references/module-contract.md.
rule_schema.section: Human section name from the standard.
rule_schema.title: Short operational title.
rule_schema.requirement: Normative requirement extracted from the standard.
rule_schema.applies_to: Repo surfaces where the rule applies.
rule_schema.trigger_kinds: Change categories that should pull this rule into an applicable checklist.
rule_schema.phases: Workflow phases where this rule is relevant.
rule_schema.enforcement_mode: validator-required, checklist-required, checklist-and-validator, advisory, or backlog.
rule_schema.evidence_required: What an implementation or verification receipt should record when applicable.
rule_schema.automation: Current or intended mechanical enforcement owner.

rules.title: Use the standard module folder shape
rules.requirement: Each functional module should own src/modules/<module>/ with components, hooks, routes, schemas, services, state, tests, and index.ts where applicable.
evidence_required: New modules use the standard src/modules/<module>/ shape where applicable.
Omitted module folders are justified by the module's actual surface.

rules.title: Export public module APIs from index
rules.requirement: Export public module APIs from index.ts.
evidence_required: New or changed module public APIs are exported from the module index.ts.
Consumers can import the module through its public surface.

rules.title: Import modules only through public surfaces
rules.requirement: Import other modules only through their public index.ts surface.
evidence_required: Cross-module imports use the target module public index.ts surface.
No imports reach into another module's internal components, hooks, routes, schemas, services, state, or tests folders.

rules.title: Use module aliases for React template cross-module imports
rules.requirement: In the React/Vite/Capacitor template, use @/modules/<module> for cross-module imports. Deep imports into another module's internals are lint errors.
evidence_required: Lint results show no deep imports into another module's internals.

rules.title: Keep data schemas close to module behavior
rules.requirement: Keep data schemas close to module behavior.
evidence_required: Module-specific schemas live with the module behavior they validate.
Shared schemas are justified by real cross-module reuse.

rules.title: Keep generic helpers in src lib
rules.requirement: Keep reusable generic helpers in src/lib.
evidence_required: Reusable generic helpers live in src/lib instead of inside a feature module.
Feature-specific helpers remain local to their owning module.

rules.title: Scale module tests to risk and shared surface
rules.requirement: Add tests proportional to module risk and shared surface area.
evidence_required: New or changed modules include tests proportional to risk and shared API surface.
If tests are omitted, the handoff records the low-risk rationale or blocker.
